ambiguities.requirement: The system shall archive the record of a former employee after some time has passed.

potential_hallucinations.requirement: The system shall allow assigning a staff member to a client or adding them to a campaign.
The system shall allow removing assignments from staff members, returning them to an unassigned state.
The system shall enable staff members to switch between different assignments during their work period.
The system shall archive the record of a former employee after some time has passed.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: When a staff member joins, they become employed and can be assigned responsibilities.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall automatically mark a new staff member as employed upon joining.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: At first, they may not be linked to any client or campaign. Over time, they can be assigned to a client or added to a campaign, depending on the work they are given.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall allow staff members to be initially unassigned and later assigned to clients or campaigns based on their responsibilities.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: While working, the staff member may move in and out of different assignments as needed.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall support dynamic assignment changes for staff members during their work period.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall allow assigning a staff member to a client or adding them to a campaign.
hallucinations.reason: This requirement is already covered in the source text and does not introduce any new information.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall enable staff members to switch between different assignments during their work period.
hallucinations.reason: This requirement is partially covered but does not fully capture the dynamic nature of assignment changes as described in the source text.

duplicates.requirement_a: The system shall allow removing assignments from staff members, returning them to an unassigned state.
duplicates.requirement_b: The system shall enable staff members to switch between different assignments during their work period.
duplicates.reason: Both requirements involve changes in assignment status but are not exact duplicates.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall mark a staff member as unemployed when they leave the job.
ambiguities.reason: This requirement is somewhat ambiguous. The source text states that staff members are no longer employed upon leaving, but it does not specify how this state change should be marked or handled within the system.

final_assessment_policy: moderate: needs_review if extraction/rewriting failed, no rewritten requirements were produced, exact duplicate rewritten requirements were detected, or the LLM validator reports 6 or more total issues across missing requirements, hallucinations, duplicates, and ambiguities
